institutionName: North Carolina Agricultural and Technical State University
collegeName: College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)
programName: Bachelor of Science in Agricultural Education — Secondary
tagline: Teach the Future — Grow the Next Generation
programDescription: The Agricultural Education — Secondary concentration prepares students to become licensed high school agriculture teachers. Combining agricultural science with pedagogy, students complete student teaching placements and FFA advisor training. Graduates are highly sought after due to a national shortage of qualified agriculture teachers, with many receiving multiple job offers before graduation.

certifications: NC Standard Professional II Teaching License
careerOutlook.outlook: There is a critical national shortage of agriculture teachers, with some states reporting 100% placement rates. NC A&T graduates are well-positioned to fill this gap while inspiring the next generation of agricultural leaders.
